channel.title: EuroBall Moves — European Basketball Transfers
channel.description: Latest player signings, extensions, departures and rumors across European basketball leagues.

item.title: EXTENDED: Federico Poser → Tezenis Verona
item.description: Federico Poser - Tezenis Verona (extended).

item.title: SIGNED: Martynas Arlauskas → Jonava Hipocredit
item.description: Martynas Arlauskas returns to Jonava Hipocredit after a year away. (1 year)

item.title: SIGNED: Sterling Brown → Zalgiris Kaunas
item.description: Kaunas Žalgiris signs Sterling Brown (ex-Partizan) on a 1+1 deal through the 2027-28 season. (1+1)

item.title: SIGNED: Darius Thompson → Olimpia Milano
item.description: Olimpia Milano signs playmaker Darius Thompson on a three-year contract. (3 years)

item.title: SIGNED: William McDowell-White → Pallacanestro Varese
item.description: Varese signs Australian playmaker William McDowell-White, EuroCup winner with Bourg.

item.title: SIGNED: Jermaine Love → Mykonos Betsson
item.description: Mykonos Betsson signs American guard Jermaine Love for 2026-27, arriving from Esenler Erokspor.

item.title: RUMOR: DJ Steward → Baskonia
item.description: DJ Steward leaves Trento via contract buyout; Baskonia set as his next destination.

item.title: SIGNED: Daan Pieters → Filou Oostende
item.description: 19-year-old forward Daan Pieters returns to Filou Oostende's regular squad after a loan spell at Okapi Aalst.

item.title: LEFT: Paris Lee
item.description: UNICS Kazan announces the departure of American playmaker Paris Lee.

item.title: SIGNED: Rasir Bolton → Río Breogán
item.description: Río Breogán signs American playmaker Rasir Bolton (ex-Napoli) for 2026-27.

item.title: SIGNED: Caleb Homesley → Casademont Zaragoza
item.description: Casademont Zaragoza signs American wing Caleb Homesley from Bahçeşehir.

item.title: SIGNED: Yves Pons → LDLC ASVEL
item.description: LDLC ASVEL announces the return of French forward Yves Pons for 2026-27 (No. 35).

item.title: SIGNED: Julius Böhmer → ALBA Berlin
item.description: ALBA Berlin signs German guard Julius Böhmer from BG Göttingen on a two-year deal until 2028. (2 years)

item.title: SIGNED: Jaime Pradilla → Real Madrid
item.description: Real Madrid signs Spanish forward Jaime Pradilla from Valencia Basket, reuniting with coach Pedro Martinez. (until 2031)

item.title: SIGNED: Anthony Cowan → Cedevita Olimpija
item.description: Cedevita Olimpija signs American point guard Anthony Cowan (28) ahead of 2026/27, arriving from Turkish side Mersin.

item.title: SIGNED: Nicola Akele → Olimpia Milano
item.description: EA7 Emporio Armani Milan signed Nicola Akele to a multi-year deal. (multi-year)

item.title: LEFT: Quinn Ellis
item.description: Quinn Ellis has left EA7 Emporio Armani Milan to pursue an opportunity in the United States.

item.title: SIGNED: Marcus Carr → Virtus Bologna
item.description: Marcus Carr signs with Virtus as fifth summer addition. (multi-year)

item.title: EXTENDED: Mfiondu Kabengele → Dubai Basketball
item.description: Dubai extends big man Mfiondu Kabengele.

item.title: SIGNED: Joshua O'Garro → London Lions
item.description: The London Lions have completed the signing of Joshua O'Garro on a one-year deal. (1 year)

item.title: SIGNED: Amedeo Della Valle → Pallacanestro Varese
item.description: Amedeo Della Valle - Pallacanestro Varese (signed). (multi-year)

item.title: EXTENDED: Jaylen Barford → UNA Hotels Reggio Emilia
item.description: Jaylen Barford - UNA Hotels Reggio Emilia (extended).

item.title: SIGNED: Chad Brown → Acqua S.Bernardo Cantù
item.description: Chad Brown - Acqua S.Bernardo Cantù (signed).

item.title: SIGNED: Alessandro Manfredotti → Nutribullet Treviso
item.description: Alessandro Manfredotti - NutriBullet Treviso Basket (signed).

item.title: SIGNED: Nick Ongenda → BAXI Manresa
item.description: Nick Ongenda - BAXI Manresa (signed).

item.title: EXTENDED: Michael Forrest → UCAM Murcia
item.description: Michael Forrest - UCAM Murcia (extended).

item.title: EXTENDED: Héctor Alderete → La Laguna Tenerife
item.description: Héctor Alderete - La Laguna Tenerife (extended).

item.title: SIGNED: Pedro Martínez → Real Madrid
item.description: Pedro Martínez - Real Madrid (signed).

item.title: SIGNED: Lovell Cabbil Jr. → Krka Novo Mesto
item.description: Lovell Cabbil Jr. - Krka Novo Mesto (signed).

item.title: EXTENDED: Krševan Klarica → KK Zadar
item.description: Krševan Klarica - KK Zadar (extended).

item.title: SIGNED: Marcus Santos-Silva → Pallacanestro Forlì
item.description: Pallacanestro Forlì announces the signing of Marcus Santos-Silva.

item.title: SIGNED: Justin Vander Baan → Kangoeroes Mechelen
item.description: Kangoeroes Mechelen signs 2.13-meter center Justin Vander Baan for the upcoming season.

item.title: EXTENDED: Ish Wainright → Hapoel Tel Aviv
item.description: Hapoel Tel Aviv extends power forward Ish Wainright through the 2027-28 season. (until 2028)

item.title: SIGNED: Jordan Wright → Bamberg Baskets
item.description: Bamberg Baskets sign American wing Jordan Wright on a one-year deal. (1 year)

item.title: LEFT: Benedikt Turudic
item.description: Benedikt Turudic leaves Veolia Towers Hamburg after two seasons as his contract expires.

item.title: LEFT: Jean Montero
item.description: Jean Montero leaves Valencia.

item.title: SIGNED: Dylan Osetkowski → Valencia Basket
item.description: Valencia reels in Dylan Osetkowski as second summer recruit. (2 years)

item.title: SIGNED: Giulio Gazzotti → Derthona Tortona
item.description: Giulio Gazzotti - Derthona Tortona (signed).

item.title: SIGNED: Jacari White → Giants Antwerp
item.description: Giants Antwerp signs 23-year-old shooting guard Jacari White (ex-North Dakota State) on a one-season contract. (1 year)

item.title: SIGNED: Isaac Bonga → Panathinaikos
item.description: Isaac Bonga agreed to join Panathinaikos on a three-year deal after buying out his previous contract. (3 years)
